summary: Excellent audience recording captures a lively ’95 show with standout jammed Stranger, Sugaree, Minglewood, Ramble and an extended Stella Blue.
review: The reviewer finds the performance far better than the notorious reputation of 1995, highlighting long, improvisational jams on “Stranger,” “Sugaree,” “Minglewood Blues,” a spirited “Ramble” and a uniquely quick yet extended “Stella Blue.” The audience (AUD) tape is praised as crystal‑clear and well balanced, making the show enjoyable despite its obscure date.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a strong positive impression of both performance (≈4/5) and recording quality (≈5/5); weighted average yields ~4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced audience tape with strong crowd reaction; no dropout or muffling noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows with extended jams and high energy; pre‑drum solo and the quick yet expansive Stella Blue keep momentum strong.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sounds excited throughout, especially on the Ramble and the two‑minute post‑vocal outro on Stella Blue.
